# CWE-325 safe — Missing Cryptographic Step (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-325-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"io"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func EncryptCardField(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	pan := c.PostForm("pan")
	key := []byte("0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef")
	block, _ := aes.NewCipher(key)
	aead, _ := cipher.NewGCM(block)
	nonce := make([]byte, aead.NonceSize())
	_, _ = io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, nonce)
	out := aead.Seal(nil, nonce, []byte(pan), []byte(c.Query("uid")))
	return db.Exec("UPDATE cards SET cipher = ? WHERE owner = ?", out, c.Query("uid")).Error
}
